description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with a cache key "always" that caches the node_modules/ directory. Define three stages: build, release, and deploy. Add a job_build job in the build stage that runs npm prune, npm install, and npm run build --production, and stores the dist/ and coverage/ directories as artifacts. Add a job_deploy_demo job in the deploy stage that depends on job_build, runs only on the master branch and not on tags, and executes bash deploy-gitlab.sh in the demo environment. Add a job_deploy_testreport job in the deploy stage that also depends on job_build, runs on all branches except tags, and runs bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) to upload coverage. Add a job_release job in the release stage that depends on job_build, runs only on tags matching the semantic version regex, and runs npm prune, npm update, and npm run ci-publish to publish the package.
